flood: Move to higher ground when safe to do so.
Avoid walking or driving through flood water.
Prepare an emergency kit with food, water, and medication.
earthquake: Drop, cover, and hold on during shaking.
Stay away from windows and heavy objects.
After shaking stops, check for injuries and hazards.
heatwave: Stay hydrated and avoid outdoor activity at peak heat.
Use fans or shaded areas to cool down.
cyclone: Secure loose outdoor items and windows.
Follow evacuation instructions from local authorities.
Keep battery-powered lights and charged devices ready.
